Class MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text.AbstractTextSegmentRenderer
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text.CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text.MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer
public class MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer extends CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
A specialized renderer for Mermaid diagrams.

This renderer translates Mermaid code blocks into visual diagrams using the mermaid.ink service. It supports a visual 'Diagram' mode and an 'Editor' mode for modifying the source.

Persistence: Switching from 'Edit Source' back to 'View Diagram' authoritatively triggers the save callback, updating the ASI's message history.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer

      public MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer(AgiPanel agiPanel, String initialContent, String language)
      Constructs a new MermaidCodeBlockSegmentRenderer.
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The agi panel instance.
      initialContent - The initial Mermaid code.
      language - The language identifier (expected to be 'mermaid').

  • Method Details

    • createInnerComponent

      protected JComponent createInnerComponent()
      Template method for subclasses to define the central component. Defaults to the high-fidelity viewer.

      Implementation details: Creates a card panel containing a scrollable visual diagram label and a nested CodeBlockSegmentRenderer for source editing. The inner editor is configured to be headerless to prevent redundant UI controls.

      Overrides:
      createInnerComponent in class CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
      Returns:
      The central JComponent.

    • updateDiagram

      private void updateDiagram()
      Generates the diagram image asynchronously using mermaid.ink.

    • updateComponentContent

      protected void updateComponentContent(String content)
      Pushes incremental content updates to the visual component. This is the authoritative ingestion point for streaming responses.

      Authoritative streaming ingestion point. It updates the virtual handle of the ephemeral resource and triggers a reload, forcing the high-fidelity viewer (NetBeans or RSyntax) to refresh reactively.

      Implementation details: Propagates streaming content updates to the internal source editor card and handles the automatic transition to Diagram mode once generation is complete.

      Overrides:
      updateComponentContent in class CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
      Parameters:
      content - The new segment content.

    • getCurrentContentFromComponent

      protected String getCurrentContentFromComponent()
      Retrieves the current content from the inner component.

      Implementation details: Retrieves the current source code from the internal editor card.

      Overrides:
      getCurrentContentFromComponent in class CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
      Returns:
      The current code content.

    • setComponentEditable

      protected void setComponentEditable(boolean editable)
      Sets the editability of the inner component.

      Implementation details: Toggles the editability of the internal source editor component.

      Overrides:
      setComponentEditable in class CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
      Parameters:
      editable - True to enable editing, false to disable.

    • addExtraHeaderButtons

      protected void addExtraHeaderButtons(JPanel leftHeaderPanel)
      Hook for subclasses to inject specialized buttons into the header area.

      Implementation details: Injects the 'Copy Image' button into the control header.

      Overrides:
      addExtraHeaderButtons in class CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
      Parameters:
      leftHeaderPanel - The panel containing the header buttons.

    • toggleEdit

      protected void toggleEdit()
      Toggles the edit mode of the renderer.

      State Persistence: When exiting edit mode, this method captures the component's content and updates the underlying ephemeral resource handle before switching the UI state. This prevents the viewer's synchronization loop from reverting the text to its original state.

      Implementation details: Extends the base toggle logic to switch between Diagram/Editor cards. Returning to Diagram mode authoritatively captures the source, resets the feedback label, and triggers the save callback to update the message history.

      Overrides:
      toggleEdit in class CodeBlockSegmentRenderer
